zh.lifeSummary: 當Benidicta de La Warde於大約1338年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾時，她的父親Simon de La Warde I19歲，母親Margaret Maude de Mortimer20歲。她於1353年與John de Babington IV在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾坎布利其結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1376年之後在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Benidicta de La Warde于大约1338年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾时，她的父亲Simon de La Warde I19岁，母亲Margaret Maude de Mortimer20岁。她于1353年与John de Babington IV在英国英格兰坎布利其爾坎布利其结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1376年之后在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Warde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Donal.

variants.name: Ward
meanings: English: occupational name for a watchman or guard, from Middle English ward ‘watchman, guard’ (Old English weard, used as both an agent noun and an abstract noun).
English: occupational name from Middle English warde ‘armed guard’ (Old English weard ‘watching, guarding’), with the same meaning as 1 above.

Irish: shortened form of McWard, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Bhaird ‘son of the poet’. The surname occurs throughout Ireland, where three different branches of the family are known as professional poets.

nameMeanings.name: Benidicta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Benedict  , in occasional use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Benedicte
meanings: Feminine form of   Benedict  , in occasional use in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Benidicta de La Warde was born about 1338, in Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Simon de La Warde I, was 19 and her mother, Margaret Maude de Mortimer, was 20. She married John de Babington IV in 1353, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 1376, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Benidicta de La Warde est née environ 1338, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Simon de La Warde I, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Margaret Maude de Mortimer, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John de Babington IV en 1353, à Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1376, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Benidicta de La Warde um 1338 in Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon de La Warde I 19 und ihre Mutter Margaret Maude de Mortimer 20. Sie hat 1353 in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom John de Babington IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1376 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Benidicta de La Warde è nata il circa 1338 nel Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Simon de La Warde I, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Margaret Maude de Mortimer, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato John de Babington IV nel 1353, nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1376, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Benidicta de La Wardeが約1338年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Simon de La Warde Iは19歳，母Margaret Maude de Mortimerは20歳であった。1353年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジでJohn de Babington IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1376年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Benidicta de La Warde(이)가 대략 1338년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon de La Warde I(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Maude de Mortimer(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1353년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 John de Babington IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1376년 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Benidicta de La Warde nasceu aproximadamente 1338, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Simon de La Warde I, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Maude de Mortimer, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Babington IV em 1353, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1376, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Benidicta de La Warde родилась около 1338 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Simon de La Warde I было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Maude de Mortimer, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Babington IV в 1353 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1376 г. в её родном городе.

Se casó con John de Babington IV en 1353, en Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1376, en su pueblo.
